headline: Intel’s AI Native 6G Alliances And New Chair Reshape Growth Story
summary: Intel announced new collaborations in AI native 6G and future telecom technologies at Mobile World Congress 2026. The company is working with Viettel High Tech and Ericsson on AI optimized network architectures and technology validation. Intel expanded its alliance with Infosys to help enterprises move from AI pilots to larger scale deployments. Dr. Craig Barratt was appointed chair of Intel's board, signaling a shift in board leadership alongside these initiatives. For investors watching...
